C_STATE_2_CMI_TXT CMI Value for Recalculated Z0250A CHAR 7 The data in this column contains the second calculated state Medicaid CMI text.
31 C_MDCR_RUG3_IDX_MAX_GRP_TXT C_MDCR_RUG3_IDX_MAX_GRP_TXT Medicare RUG III Index Maximized Group CHAR 10 This column contains the calculated RUG III Medicare Index Maximized Group code.
32 C_MDCR_RUG3_IDX_MAX_VRSN_TXT C_MDCR_RUG3_IDX_MAX_VRSN_TXT Medicare RUG III Index Maximized Version CHAR 10 This column contains the calculated RUG III Medicare Index
